steps.title: Use the area equation
steps.content:
Area equals width times length. The width is $n$, the length is $n+6$, and the area is $280$.
$$n(n+6)=280$$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor.
$$n^2+6n-280=0$$
$$(n+20)(n-14)=0$$

steps.title: Choose the positive width
steps.content: The solutions are $n=-20$ and $n=14$. A width cannot be negative, so use the positive solution. The answer is 14.
